tasks.subject: Task 1: Add currentChunkIndex to analyzeText
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `analyzeText` returns the flat index of the chunk the cursor is currently in.

**Files:**
- Modify: `js/modules/splitter.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `currentChunkIndex` present in `analyzeText` return value (0-based number)
- [ ] Cursor at start returns `0`; cursor past 500 chars with 500-char limit returns `1`
- [ ] Cursor in second manual segment returns correct flat index

**Verify:** Browser console

```json:metadata
{"files": ["js/modules/splitter.js"], "verifyCommand": "browser console", "acceptanceCriteria": ["currentChunkIndex in return", "correct for single segment", "correct for multi-segment"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update renderSplitPreview with activeIndex support
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `renderSplitPreview` accepts optional `activeIndex`, applies `.preview-item--active`, and scrolls active item into view.

**Files:**
- Modify: `js/modules/ui.js`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["js/modules/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "browser inspect", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no regression without activeIndex", "preview-item--active at activeIndex", "scrollIntoView called"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add focus preview panel to HTML and CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Focus mode shows a two-column layout: writing area (2/3) + split preview panel (1/3).

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `styles.css`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "styles.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm start + browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["two-column focus layout", "independent scroll", "preview-item--active styled", "textarea fills column"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire up focus preview in main.js
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Focus preview renders live toot splits and scrolls the active toot into view as cursor moves.

**Files:**
- Modify: `js/main.js`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["js/main.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm start + browser end-to-end", "acceptanceCriteria": ["focusSplitPreview renders on input", "active toot highlighted", "active toot scrolls into view", "normal layout unaffected"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
